creator: zeus@ibs.dn.ua
text:
make fails with:

> make
..
===>  Building for freeradius3-3.0.0_3
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius3/work/freeradius-server-3.0.0'
gmake[2]: *** No rule to make target `LDFLAGS'.  Stop.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/freeradius3/work/freeradius-server-3.0.0'

How-To-Repeat: just run make in the port directory
